PREF-WEIGHT.citation: Local rule placeholder: patient-preference / shared-decision-making note

ADHERENCE-LAI.citation: Local rule placeholder: long-acting injectable in non-adherence guidance

PASTRESP-PARTIAL.citation: Local rule placeholder: prior-partial-response-guided selection principle

PASTRESP-FAIL.citation: Local rule placeholder: prior-failure/intolerance avoidance principle

PASTRESP-INADQ.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms: Clinical Guidance from the Psychopharmacology Algorithm Project at the Harvard South Shore Psychiatry Residency Program. 2020; adequate-trial decision nodes.

PASTRESP-ADEQ-NONRESP.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms: Clinical Guidance from the Psychopharmacology Algorithm Project at the Harvard South Shore Psychiatry Residency Program. 2020; adequate nonresponse decision nodes.

PASTRESP-INTOL.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms: Clinical Guidance from the Psychopharmacology Algorithm Project at the Harvard South Shore Psychiatry Residency Program. 2020; intolerance/poor tolerability branches.

PASTRESP-AE.citation: Local rule placeholder: documented prior adverse-effect avoidance

SUICIDE-OD.citation: Local rule placeholder: overdose-toxicity / quantity-to-dispense guidance in suicide risk

BIP-LITHIUM-FHX.citation: Local rule placeholder: family-history-of-lithium-response selection principle

MDD-SSRI-FIRSTLINE.citation: Local rule placeholder: first-line antidepressant guidance for MDD (e.g. NICE/APA depression guideline)

MDD-PSYCHOTIC-AUGMENT.citation: Local rule placeholder: management of depression with psychotic features (antipsychotic+antidepressant or ECT)

BIP-LITHIUM-FIRSTLINE.citation: Local rule placeholder: lithium first-line for bipolar mania/maintenance and anti-suicidal evidence (bipolar guideline)

BIP-MANIA-ANTIPSYCHOTIC.citation: Local rule placeholder: second-generation antipsychotics first-line for acute mania (bipolar guideline)

BIP-LAMOTRIGINE.citation: Local rule placeholder: lamotrigine for bipolar depression/maintenance of depressive episodes (bipolar guideline)

PSY-CLOZAPINE-TRD.citation: Local rule placeholder: clozapine reserved for treatment-resistant schizophrenia with mandatory ANC monitoring (boxed warning / TRS guideline)

PSY-CLOZAPINE-TRS.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms: Clinical Guidance from the Psychopharmacology Algorithm Project at the Harvard South Shore Psychiatry Residency Program. 2020; schizophrenia algorithm clozapine node after adequate antipsychotic nonresponse.

ANX-SSRI-FIRSTLINE.citation: Local rule placeholder: SSRIs first-line for anxiety/OCD spectrum (anxiety/OCD guideline)

ADHD-STIMULANT-FIRSTLINE.citation: Local rule placeholder: stimulants first-line for ADHD (ADHD guideline)

ADHD-STIMULANT-CARDIAC.citation: Local rule placeholder: cardiovascular assessment before stimulants (ADHD guideline / product label)

ADHD-STIMULANT-SUD.citation: Local rule placeholder: stimulant misuse/diversion risk in comorbid substance use (ADHD guideline)

ADHD-ATOMOXETINE-ALT.citation: Local rule placeholder: atomoxetine as non-stimulant alternative (ADHD guideline)

SUD-NALTREXONE-OPIOID-FREE.citation: Local rule placeholder: opioid-free interval required before naltrexone to avoid precipitated withdrawal (product label / addiction guideline)

PED-ATOMOXETINE-SUICIDALITY.citation: Local rule placeholder: atomoxetine boxed warning for suicidal ideation in children/adolescents (FDA boxed warning)

GERI-ANTIPSYCHOTIC-ELDERLY.citation: Local rule placeholder: cautious antipsychotic use in older adults (geriatric prescribing guidance)

GERI-SEDATION-FALLS.citation: Local rule placeholder: sedation/fall risk with sedating agents in older adults (Beers/STOPP criteria)

RENAL-SEVERE.citation: Local rule placeholder: dose reduction/avoidance of renally-cleared psychotropics in severe renal impairment (renal dosing reference)

HEPATIC-VALPROATE.citation: Local rule placeholder: valproate hepatotoxicity; caution/avoid in hepatic impairment (product label)

CARDIAC-QT-ILLNESS.citation: Local rule placeholder: QT-prolonging agents in cardiac illness need ECG/electrolyte review (cardiac safety guideline)

SUICIDE-OD-GRADED.citation: Local rule placeholder: limited dispensing/means restriction in active suicidality (suicide prevention guideline)

DDI-LITHIUM-LEVEL.citation: Local rule placeholder: NSAIDs/ACEi/ARB/thiazide raise lithium levels (interaction reference)

DDI-CLOZAPINE-MARROW.citation: Local rule placeholder: additive myelosuppression with clozapine + carbamazepine (interaction reference)

DDI-SEROTONIN-MAOI.citation: Local rule placeholder: SSRI + MAOI/linezolid serotonin syndrome, contraindicated without washout (interaction reference)

DDI-SEROTONIN-OTHER.citation: Local rule placeholder: additive serotonergic risk with tramadol/triptans/St John's wort (interaction reference)

_meta.description: Maps each rule_id used by the engine to its supporting citation. Every entry is a PLACEHOLDER until a psychiatrist replaces it with a real, licensed guideline / drug-reference citation. The engine never invents citations; an unmapped rule simply carries no reference.

status_legend.placeholder: Needs a real citation before clinical use.
status_legend.verified: Citation reviewed and approved by a named clinician.
